productDisplayName: Gas Men Blue Freak Flip Flops
description: Style Note Walking in a pair of these thongs from gas feels like walking on cotton. To add oodles of style, team these flip-flops with casual denims and a comfort Fit tee. Product Details Blue flip flops with wide straps and a toe separator A padded and textured footbed Foamy rubber outsole Thick rubber outsole with patterned grooves Material and Care Synthetic Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust
